import React from 'react'; import { formatPrice } from '../../utils/formatPrice'; export default function CartItem({ item, value }) { const { id, title, img, price, total, count } = item; const { increment, decrement, removeItem } = value; return ( {title} {formatPrice(price)}
{count}
{formatPrice(total)}
{title}

{formatPrice(price)} each

{count}
{formatPrice(total)}
); }
